de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io

Class OutputStreamProofSaver

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.OutputStreamProofSaver
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    ProofSaver

    public class OutputStreamProofSaver
extends Object
    Saves a proof to a given OutputStream.
    Author:
    Kai Wallisch

      • makePathsRelative

        private String makePathsRelative(String header)
        Searches in the header for absolute paths to Java files and tries to replace them by paths relative to the proof file to be saved.

      • tryToMakeFilenameRelative

        private static String tryToMakeFilenameRelative(String absPath,
                                                String basePath)
        Try to create a relative path, but return the absolute path if a relative path cannot be found. This may happen on Windows systems (bug #1480).
